message:
hygiene: consolidate sqliteConnString into internal/storage

Three identical implementations of SQLite connection string building
existed in cmd/bd/doctor, cmd/bd/doctor/fix, and internal/storage.
Consolidated into storage.SQLiteConnString with thin wrappers in
the doctor packages. Also fixes missing _time_format=sqlite pragma
in local_provider.go read-only variant.

Closes dolt-test-ls7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
